text.title: Database Selection Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid decision-record artefact for database-selection. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner plural; alternatives_rejected has only 1 entry without reason; reversibility not in enum.

forbidden.pattern: `alternatives_rejected` has fewer than 2 entries — DB selection without ≥2 rejected alternatives is decision laundering.
`rollback_path` missing required keys — DB selection MUST include rollback estimate.
